text.title: Business Metric Categories
text.summary: Revenue metrics, customer metrics, and marketing funnel metrics with definitions and calculation methods.

list.item: MRR (Monthly Recurring Revenue): total recurring revenue normalized to a month
MRR Growth: (current MRR - prior MRR) / prior MRR × 100%
New MRR: revenue from new customers this month
Churned MRR: revenue lost from canceled customers
Expansion MRR: additional revenue from upgrades and add-ons
Net New MRR: New MRR + Expansion MRR - Churned MRR
Total customers: count of active paying customers
New customers: signups that converted to paid this month
Churned customers: customers who canceled this month
Churn rate: churned / total at start of period × 100%
LTV (Lifetime Value): ARPU / monthly churn rate
CAC (Customer Acquisition Cost): total sales + marketing spend / new customers
LTV:CAC ratio: target 3:1 minimum, 8:1 healthy for SaaS
CAC payback period: CAC / (ARPU × gross margin) in months
Organic visitors: monthly visits from search and direct
Trial-to-paid conversion: paid conversions / trial starts × 100% (target: 20-40%)
Cost per acquisition (CPA): spend / conversions per channel

rule.statement: Track each funnel metric per acquisition channel (organic, paid, referral, direct). Channel-level metrics reveal where to invest; blended metrics hide the signal.
rule.rationale: A 3% overall conversion rate may be 8% for organic and 0.5% for paid. Blended metrics would suggest the paid channel is contributing; channel breakdown reveals it is destroying ROI.
